explanation: Shovel, Rake, Trowel, and Pruners are all common types of reusable hand tools used for gardening. Fertilizer is a consumable product used to nourish plants, not a tool.

All tokens represent Wonders of the Ancient World. However, the Hanging Gardens of Babylon, Statue of Zeus at Olympia, Colossus of Rhodes, and Lighthouse of Alexandria have all been destroyed or lost to history. The Great Pyramid of Giza is the only one of the original Seven Wonders that remains largely intact today.

Scissors, Pliers, Trousers, and Spectacles are all items that are typically referred to in the plural form (e.g., 'a pair of scissors') due to their two-part nature or conventional usage. A spoon is commonly referred to in the singular.
